trailing_drawdown_mechanics.description: Drawdown floor trails your high-water mark upward but never moves down. Locks once it reaches the initial account balance.
trailing_drawdown_mechanics.example: Start at $50K, floor is $47K. If you make $2K (balance $52K), floor trails to $49K. At $53K balance, floor is $50K — now locked. Floor never drops below $50K again.

trailing_drawdown_mechanics.description: Same trailing logic but tracks real-time (intraday), not end-of-day. Tighter — open P&L counts against you.
trailing_drawdown_mechanics.warning: Open positions count against drawdown in real-time. A $1500 unrealized loss on a $50K account with $2K max drawdown puts you $500 from violation.

trailing_drawdown_mechanics.description: Fixed drawdown. Floor is always initial_balance minus max_drawdown. Does not trail.

consistency_rule.description: No single trading day can account for more than 30% of the profit target. For a $6K target, max single-day profit is $1,800.
consistency_rule.action_at_threshold: Warn at 25% ($1,500). Block new entries at 30% ($1,800). Allow existing positions to close.

news_blackout.notes: Block entries 5 min before and after high-impact news. Exits always allowed. Calendar events loaded manually until we wire an economic calendar API.

no_hedging.description: Cannot hold simultaneous long and short positions in the same instrument or correlated instruments (ES/MES, NQ/MNQ). TopstepX explicitly prohibits hedging.

A_plus.label: A+ Setup
A_plus.description: 5% of account balance per trade. Requires: hourly double bottom/top + 3-min double bottom/top + Heatseeker confluence + VIX at key level.
checklist: Hourly chart shows double bottom/top or key S&R level
3-minute chart confirms with double bottom/top pattern
Heatseeker signal has A or A+ grade with confluence
VIX at key level supporting directional bias

B.label: B Setup
B.description: 2.5% of account balance per trade. Good signal, decent confluence, but missing one or more A+ checklist items.

C.label: C Setup (Lotto)
C.description: 1% of account balance. Speculative / low-conviction. Small size, wide stop, let it play out.

sizing_tiers.max_daily_exposure_description: Total risk across all open positions cannot exceed 30% of account balance in a single day.

off_hours_rules.notes: Off-hours = outside RTH (9:30-16:00 ET). Micros only, 1 contract max, $50 max loss per trade.

global_rules.max_daily_loss_description: Stop trading when daily losses reach 75% of the daily loss limit ($1,125 on $1,500 limit). Preserves buffer.
global_rules.cooldown_description: After 3 consecutive losses, mandatory 30-minute cooldown. Prevents tilt/revenge trading.
global_rules.no_trade_close_description: No new entries in final 15 minutes before RTH close (3:45 PM ET). Avoids settlement risk.
global_rules.balance_buffer_description: Must maintain 20% buffer above max drawdown floor. If floor is $47K, stop trading at $47K + ($50K * 0.20) = $57K... actually this means stop when within 20% of the floor.

scale_in.description: Can add to a winning position up to 2 times. Initial position must be in profit before adding. Each add uses the next smaller sizing tier.

scale_out.description: Take partial profits at 50%, 75%, and 100% of target. Move stop to breakeven after first partial.
